description.value: Speak cutting words at one creature you can see within medium range. Target takes [[/damage 4 type=psychic]] damage and makes [[/save type=will]]. Compare your targeting successes to their save successes. If you have more, target adds 1 to their next attack roll before end of their next turn.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = Fails
- 1 = Half damage (2)
- 2 = Full damage (4) + penalty on attack
- 3 = Enhanced damage (8) + penalty on attack
system.weavingRoll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
